Variables.Name: TrailBone
Variables.Description: Reference to the active bone in the hierarchy to modify.

Variables.Name: ChainLength
Variables.Description: Number of bones above the active one in the hierarchy to modify. ChainLength should be at least 2.

Variables.Name: ChainBoneAxis
Variables.Description: Axis of the bones to point along trail.

Variables.Name: bInvertChainBoneAxis
Variables.Description: Invert the direction specified in ChainBoneAxis.

Variables.Name: TrailRelaxation_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: How quickly we 'relax' the bones to their animated positions. Deprecated. Replaced to TrailRelaxationCurve

Variables.Name: TrailRelaxationSpeed
Variables.Description: How quickly we 'relax' the bones to their animated positions. Time 0 will map to top root joint, time 1 will map to the bottom joint.

Variables.Name: bLimitStretch
Variables.Description: Limit the amount that a bone can stretch from its ref-pose length.

Variables.Name: StretchLimit
Variables.Description: If bLimitStretch is true, this indicates how long a bone can stretch beyond its length in the ref-pose.

Variables.Name: bActorSpaceFakeVel
Variables.Description: Whether 'fake' velocity should be applied in actor or world space.

Variables.Name: BaseJoint
Variables.Description: Base Joint to calculate velocity from. If none, it will use Component's World Transform. .
